utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present, additional_services is present, total_budget is present; property_coverage is null, travel_coverage is null. Now assess if the included ones are fully specified per the format: The format requires 'health_coverage: physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the plan provides both physical and mental, each with plan name, monthly and annual costs, and benefits; this is fully specified. 'property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs'—missing (null), so not included. 'travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs'—missing (null). 'additional_services: any enhancement services with costs'—provided with two services, each with monthly/annual cost and benefits; counts as included. 'total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'—provided with monthly_total and annual_total; included. Therefore, 3 out of 5 items are successfully included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes two named health plans and two add-on services. I matched each item to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings dataset: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health and also under mental_health (same plan name), Telemedicine Services under health_enhancement_services, and Wellness Programs under health_enhancement_services.
